data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time availability sync to ClassPass.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Real-time availability sync to ClassPass', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for real-time availability sync, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence or actions that specifically address this functionality. This indicates a gap in the validation process, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of real-time availability sync to ClassPass.
